程序包 mypakege

类 Schedule

java.lang.Object
mypakege.Schedule
public class Schedule extends Object

  • 字段概要

    字段
    修饰符和类型
    字段
    说明
    private static final int
    CAPACITY
     
    private Section[]
    list
     
    private int
    size
     

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    Schedule()
    Creates an empty schedule with initial capacity 4.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    add(Section s)
    Adds a section to the schedule (grows the array when needed).
    boolean
    classroomAvailable(Classroom room, int period)
    Returns true if the classroom is free at the given period.
    Section
    get(Course c, int period)
    Returns the section matching course and period, or null if not found.
    private void
    grow()
    Grows the internal array by CAPACITY when it is full.
    boolean
    hasCoursePeriod(Course c, int period)
    Returns true if a section with the given course and period exists.
    boolean
    instructorConflict(Instructor ins, int period)
    Returns true if the instructor is already teaching at the given period.
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    Returns true if the schedule has no sections.
    void
    printByCourse()
    Prints the schedule sorted by course number and period, including each section roster.
    void
    printByLocation()
    Prints the schedule sorted by campus and building, including each section roster.
    boolean
    remove(Course c, int period)
    Removes the section identified by course and period.
    private void
    sortByCampusBuilding()
    Sorts sections in-place by campus, then by building.
    private void
    sortByCourseTime()
    Sorts sections in-place by course code, then by period.
    boolean
    studentEnrolledSameCourse(Profile p, Course c)
    Returns true if the student is enrolled in any section of the same course.
    boolean
    studentTimeConflict(Profile p, int period)
    Returns true if the student is already enrolled in another section at the same period.

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • list

      private Section[] list

      private int size

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Schedule

      public Schedule()
      Creates an empty schedule with initial capacity 4.

  • 方法详细资料

    • grow

      private void grow()
      Grows the internal array by CAPACITY when it is full.

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns true if the schedule has no sections.

    • get

      public Section get(Course c, int period)
      Returns the section matching course and period, or null if not found.

    • hasCoursePeriod

      public boolean hasCoursePeriod(Course c, int period)
      Returns true if a section with the given course and period exists.

    • instructorConflict

      public boolean instructorConflict(Instructor ins, int period)
      Returns true if the instructor is already teaching at the given period.

    • classroomAvailable

      public boolean classroomAvailable(Classroom room, int period)
      Returns true if the classroom is free at the given period.

    • studentTimeConflict

      public boolean studentTimeConflict(Profile p, int period)
      Returns true if the student is already enrolled in another section at the same period.

    • studentEnrolledSameCourse

      public boolean studentEnrolledSameCourse(Profile p, Course c)
      Returns true if the student is enrolled in any section of the same course.

    • add

      public void add(Section s)
      Adds a section to the schedule (grows the array when needed).

    • remove

      public boolean remove(Course c, int period)
      Removes the section identified by course and period. Returns true if removed; false if the section does not exist.

    • sortByCourseTime

      private void sortByCourseTime()
      Sorts sections in-place by course code, then by period.

    • sortByCampusBuilding

      private void sortByCampusBuilding()
      Sorts sections in-place by campus, then by building.

    • printByCourse

      public void printByCourse()
      Prints the schedule sorted by course number and period, including each section roster.

    • printByLocation

      public void printByLocation()
      Prints the schedule sorted by campus and building, including each section roster.
